mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT hot_stamping_paper_type FROM products WHERE hot_stamping_paper_type IS NOT NULL AND hot_stamping_paper_type != '' ORDER BY hot_stamping_paper_type
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM products WHERE name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY name
SELECT DISTINCT hot_stamping_paper_type FROM products WHERE name = #{seriesName} AND hot_stamping_paper_type IS NOT NULL AND hot_stamping_paper_type != '' ORDER BY hot_stamping_paper_type
SELECT id, name, model_number, material_number, hot_stamping_paper_type FROM products WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, model_number, material_number, hot_stamping_paper_type FROM products WHERE name = #{seriesName} ORDER BY model_number
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM products WHERE hot_stamping_paper_type = #{paperType} AND name IS NOT NULL AND hot_stamping_paper_type IS NOT NULL AND hot_stamping_paper_type != '' ORDER BY name

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p INNER JOIN leo_gp_numbers lgn ON p.id = lgn.project_id WHERE lgn.company_number = #{companyNumber} AND p.hot_stamping_paper_type = #{paperType} AND p.name IS NOT NULL AND p.hot_stamping_paper_type IS NOT NULL AND p.hot_stamping_paper_type != '' AND lgn.company_number IS NOT NULL AND lgn.company_number != '' ORDER BY p.name

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.hot_stamping_paper_type FROM products p INNER JOIN leo_gp_numbers lgn ON p.id = lgn.project_id WHERE lgn.company_number = #{companyNumber} AND p.hot_stamping_paper_type = #{paperType} AND p.name = #{seriesName} AND p.hot_stamping_paper_type IS NOT NULL AND p.hot_stamping_paper_type != '' AND lgn.company_number IS NOT NULL AND lgn.company_number != '' ORDER BY p.model_number
